name: launch-control
description: Give an idea + a CTA + a website. A swarm of Claude agents plans, makes, and ships a whole week of on-brand launch content across every social channel, and grades its own work before it goes out.

scripts.test: tsx --test lib/critic.test.ts lib/rubric.test.ts lib/visual-critic.test.ts lib/bright-data.test.ts lib/review/review.test.ts
